---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a documentation improvement or new script/feature
labels: enhancement
---

## Type of contribution

<!-- Choose one: -->
- [ ] Documentation improvement (clarifying steps, adding troubleshooting, fixing outdated content)
- [ ] New feature or script (new automation, new maintenance script, new capability)

---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

A clear description of what problem or gap you're experiencing. For example: "There's no script to handle key renewal when a subkey expires" or "Step 4 is ambiguous and I had to guess at the right command."

---

## Describe the solution you'd like

What would you like to exist? Be as specific as you can. If you're suggesting a new script, describe what it should do step by step. If you're suggesting a docs change, describe what's missing or unclear and what the improved version would say.

---

## Use case: what security or workflow problem does this solve?

Explain the real-world scenario this addresses. Who benefits, and how? Good contributions solve concrete problems that other users of this workflow are likely to encounter.

---

## Have you tested a solution on actual hardware?

<!-- This project requires physical Tails OS + YubiKey hardware to validate scripts. -->
- [ ] Yes — I have tested this on Tails + YubiKey and it works (describe hardware below)
- [ ] No — this is a documentation or config change that doesn't require hardware validation
- [ ] No — I have an idea but haven't implemented or tested it yet

If yes, describe your test setup: Tails version, YubiKey model and firmware, hardware used.

---

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider or try? Why is the solution you're proposing better than the alternatives?
